title: DCPU Nalanda Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 30 Support Person Posts
description: District Child Protection Unit Nalanda (DCPU Nalanda) has declared the latest job notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for 30 Support Person Jobs. Candidates who have qualified for any degree, post-graduation, or MSW can grab this chance and apply for the DCPU Nalanda Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
